cases.prompt: 카카오 로그인이랑 Apple 로그인 추가해줘. Supabase로 가고 싶어.

assertions.text: Selects Supabase Auth as the provider per the provider decision tree
Implements the Kakao and Apple social-login OAuth callback flow (provider_user_id lookup in auth_providers)
Produces the users / auth_providers / sessions schema for account linking

cases.prompt: Implement signup with Passkey + email magic link, plus role-based access.

assertions.text: Implements Passkey (WebAuthn) and Magic Link email auth methods
Sets up role-based access with the free / pro / team_admin / enterprise tiers
Includes session management plus security essentials like CSRF token, rate limiting, and Argon2id hashing

cases.prompt: 결제 전에 한국 본인인증(PASS/NICE) 붙여줘. 14세 미만은 막아야 해.

assertions.text: Wires Korea CI/DI verification via PASS or NICE 본인인증
Blocks under-14 users and enforces one-account-per-person at the verification gate
